mutators.name: phase_permutation
mutators.description: Permute pre-execution, transaction, and post-execution access order while preserving declared block_access_index values.

mutators.name: same_slot_aliasing
mutators.description: Force the same storage slot to appear in read, write, and read_write BAL entries across different phases.

mutators.name: index_boundary_shift
mutators.description: Generate boundary cases around index 0, 1, n, and n+1 to catch off-by-one canonicalization bugs.

invariants.name: bal_phase_index_invariant
invariants.description: Pre-execution uses index 0, transactions use 1..n, and post-execution or withdrawal uses n+1.

invariants.name: cross_client_bal_hash_equivalence
invariants.description: All clients must produce or accept the same BAL hash for the same valid fixture.

invariants.name: cross_client_payload_status_equivalence
invariants.description: All clients must agree on payload validity for the same fixture.
